description: A calm mechanical koi companion pet with ivory and rust-orange layered scales, brass joints, glassy round eyes, translucent fin membranes, and an elegant flowing tail.

idle.notes: Calm suspended hover with tiny tail sway, soft pectoral fin fanning, and minimal buoyancy drift.

walk.notes: Directional swim rows used for left-right travel and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Gentle forward probe with subtle head turn and observant glass-eye focus.

happy.notes: Restrained uplift with slightly broader fin spread and lighter tail sweep.

sleep.notes: Low-activity suspended rest with half-closed eye and reduced fin motion.

float.notes: Slow buoyant hover loop for calm mid-water suspension.

rise.notes: Gentle upward swim and settle with graceful fin opening.

melancholy.notes: Subdued low-power droop and recovery loop.

float.notes: Extra support loop kept because it was requested as a high-risk motion to validate early.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the same true-facing swim strips as locomotion.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
swim_left and swim_right are not swapped
swim_left head, mouth, body, fins, and tail all face left
swim_right head, mouth, body, fins, and tail all face right
tail sweep direction stays coordinated with forward propulsion
float and sleep preserve the same fish identity without direction confusion
